content: Node.js safe JSON parsing pattern: wrap readFileSync + JSON.parse in try-catch, return null/empty on any error, write warning to stderr (not stdout). For missing files use existsSync check before readFileSync. Pattern: try { if (!existsSync(path)) { process.stderr.write('# warning: ...'); return empty; } const raw = readFileSync(path, 'utf8'); return JSON.parse(raw); } catch(e) { process.stderr.write('# warning: ...'); return empty; }. This matches agentmap's existing graceful degradation pattern in PhpParser._resolvePsr4().
